markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on SEO strategy and review performance.](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**SEO underperforming on key terms** (e.g., "AI roleplay for sales"), prompting a strategic shift from generic content to targeted "money pages."](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [**A new backlink reporting dashboard is required** to justify the $48k/year budget, as Exec has no visibility into the workstream's progress or strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [**The new strategy centers on building dedicated solutions pages** for high-intent commercial keywords (e.g., `/sales-training`), linking them from the homepage to distribute "link juice."](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
  - [**GrowthX will support this shift** by providing keyword analysis for each new page and helping create data-driven content to earn high-authority backlinks.](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Gap

  - [**Problem:** After 11 months, Exec ranks poorly for high-intent keywords like "AI roleplay for sales," failing to capture table-stakes traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [**Goal:** Win on these core keywords, not just niche or long-tail terms.](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [**Competitor Benchmark:** Second Nature successfully ranks for both "AI roleplay" and "sales training software," demonstrating the viability of this dual approach.](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)

### Backlink Workstream Visibility

  - [**Concern:** Exec has no visibility into the $48k/year backlink building workstream.](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [**GrowthX Response:** Megan confirmed the work is happening (\~10 links/mo) and will deliver a report.](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [**Analysis (Jo):**](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
      - [Exec's SEMrush Authority Score is 31, a reliable metric.](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
      - [**Target:** Acquire backlinks from sites with Authority Scores ≥31; scores \>50 (e.g., TechCrunch) are most valuable.](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Create data-driven content (e.g., "State of AI Roleplay" report) using Exec's unique insights to earn natural, high-quality backlinks.](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)

### New SEO Strategy: Solutions Pages

  - [**Decision:** Shift from generic content to dedicated "money pages" targeting high-intent commercial keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The homepage cannot rank for specific terms like "sales training software" without diluting its broader message.](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [**Page Plan (Sean):**](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
      - [**Role-Specific:** `/sales-training`, `/lnd`, `/customer-support`](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
      - [**Industry-Specific:** `/dealerships` (live), `/insurance`, `/real-estate`](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [**Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
      - [**Internal Linking:** Link new solutions pages from the homepage to distribute "link juice" and improve ranking potential.](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [**Blog Support:** Update existing blog posts with callouts and links to the new solutions pages.](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)
      - [**Pillar-Cluster Model:** Adopt a bidirectional linking structure where all pages link to and from the central "money page" to maximize juice distribution.](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Megan (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
      - [Deliver a report on the backlink workstream, including a dashboard and strategy overview.](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [**Jo (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
      - [Provide keyword analysis (primary/secondary) for each new solutions page.](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [**Sean (Exec):**](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
      - [Send GrowthX the list of new solutions pages in order of creation.](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
      - [Share Nick's LinkedIn posts for content inspiration.](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [**Garett (Exec):**](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
      - [Review and approve the prompt suggestions.](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
      - [Launch the `/ai-roleplay-for-sales` page, using its copy and metadata to compete directly with Second Nature.](https://fathom.video/share/kPqpY5f8QmTn3m5DCprRxzSr57KJZK5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
